creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
slippy$ make check-orphans
/!\ iconv-2.0_4: Makefile warnings, please consider fixing /!\

Please set LICENSE for this port

===>   iconv-2.0_4 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
===> Fetching all distfiles required by iconv-2.0_4 for building
===>  Extracting for iconv-2.0_4
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for iconv-2.0.tar.gz.
===>  Patching for iconv-2.0_4
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for iconv-2.0_4 from /export/freebsd/git/ports/converters/iconv/files
===>   iconv-2.0_4 depends on package: perl5>=5.32.r0<5.33 - found
===>  Configuring for iconv-2.0_4
===>  Building for iconv-2.0_4
--- all_subdir_lib ---
===> lib (all)
--- objwarn ---
--- aliases.h ---
--- biconv.h ---
cp iconv.h biconv.h
--- objwarn ---
Warning: Object directory not changed from original /export/wrkdir/amd64/export/freebsd/git/ports/converters/iconv/work/iconv-2.0/lib
--- aliases.h ---
cat /export/wrkdir/amd64/export/freebsd/git/ports/converters/iconv/work/iconv-2.0/lib/../ccs/charset.aliases /export/wrkdir/amd64/export/freebsd/git/ports/converters/iconv/work/iconv-2.0/lib/../ces/charset.aliases | /export/wrkdir/amd64/export/freebsd/git/ports/converters/iconv/work/iconv-2.0/lib/../iconv_builtin ccs_builtin.o us-ascii.o  ces_builtin.o ucs-4-internal.o utf-8.o PIC euc-jp.o euc-kr.o euc-tw.o gb2312.o iso-10646-ucs-2.o iso-10646-ucs-4.o ucs-2-internal.o utf-16.o > aliases.h

--- ccs.o ---
--- ces.o ---
--- ces_euc.o ---
--- aliases.o ---

--- ccs.o ---
ccs.c:146:40: warning: implicit declaration of function 'ntohs' is invalid in C99 [-Wimplicit-function-declaration]
        return ch & 0x80 ? UCS_CHAR_INVALID : ntohs(abstable->_7bit.data[ch]);
                                              ^
ccs.c:152:9: warning: implicit declaration of function 'ntohs' is invalid in C99 [-Wimplicit-function-declaration]
        return ntohs(abstable->_8bit.data[ch]);
               ^
ccs.c:162:15: warning: implicit declaration of function 'ntohl' is invalid in C99 [-Wimplicit-function-declaration]
        sub_table =  iconv_table_elt_n(table, ch >> 8, iconv_ccs_table_7bit);
                     ^
ccs.c:96:31: note: expanded from macro 'iconv_table_elt_n'
        ((type *)(((char *)(base)) + ntohl(((uint32_t *)(base))[(i)])))
                                     ^
ccs.c:164:43: warning: implicit declaration of function 'ntohs' is invalid in C99 [-Wimplicit-function-declaration]
--- ces.o ---
ces.c:68:7: warning: implicitly declaring library function 'strcmp' with type 'int (const char *, const char *)' [-Wimplicit-function-declaration]
                if (strcmp(ces_ptr->key, name) == 0)
                    ^
ces.c:68:7: note: include the header <string.h> or explicitly provide a declaration for 'strcmp'
--- ccs.o ---
                                               : ntohs(sub_table->data[ch & 0x7F]);
                                                 ^
ccs.c:171:3: warning: implicit declaration of function 'ntohl' is invalid in C99 [-Wimplicit-function-declaration]

                ^

                                     ^

                                               : ntohs(sub_table->data[ch & 0xFF]);
                                                 ^
ccs.c:188:14: warning: passing 'unsigned char const[8]' to parameter of type 'const char *' converts between pointers to integer types where one is of the unique plain 'char' type and the other is not [-Wpointer-sign]
        if (strncmp(table->label, ICONV_TBL_LABEL, ICONV_TBL_LABEL_SIZE))
                    ^~~~~~~~~~~~
/usr/include/string.h:111:26: note: passing argument to parameter here
int      strncmp(const char *, const char *, size_t) __pure;
                             ^
ccs.c:203:19: warning: implicit declaration of function 'ntohl' is invalid in C99 [-Wimplicit-function-declaration]
                ccs->from_ucs = iconv_table_elt_n(table->tables,
                                ^
ccs.c:96:31: note: expanded from macro 'iconv_table_elt_n'
        ((type *)(((char *)(base)) + ntohl(((uint32_t *)(base))[(i)])))
                                     ^
